title: Stolen Nearly 20 Years Ago, the Fossils of This Giant Predator That Once Roamed Ancient Asia Have Finally Returned Home
description: An ancient predator is once again at the center of attention, not because of how it lived millions of years ago, but because of the remarkable journey its fossils have taken in modern times.

title: Letter to the Editor | Push back on fossil fuels
Elusive Goblin Shark Glides Past Camera 2,000 Feet Deeper Than Expected — a Rare Sighting for This Living Fossil
description: Learn how living goblin sharks recorded near Jarvis Island and in the Tonga Trench extended the species’ known Central Pacific range and set a new depth record for mackerel sharks.

title: Hellboy in Love: Obsidian #1 Brings Romantic Archaeology to Crete
description: Hellboy and Anastasia face ancient dangers and a mysterious society in this new two-part comic story.

title: Shelf Life: Adopt a dinosaur and enjoy pasta paleontology at Missoula Public Library
description: Activities at the Missoula Public Library this week.
